text.value:
DELETE t
FROM dbo.AccountCoachingSessions t
JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON t.accountInfoId = a.ID
JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
WHERE
    (
        sub.OrganizationTypeId <> 2
    )
    OR
    (
        sub.OrganizationTypeId = 2
        AND a.ID NOT IN (23382)
        AND sub.SubscriptionStatusID <> 1
        AND sub.dateSubscriptionStatusChanged <= DATEADD(MONTH, -6, GETDATE())
    );

/*DELETE t

INNER JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON t.accountID = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID

WHERE
    (
        sub.OrganizationTypeId <> 2
    )
    OR
    (
        sub.OrganizationTypeId = 2
        AND a.ID NOT IN (23382)
        AND sub.SubscriptionStatusID <> 1
        AND sub.dateSubscriptionStatusChanged <= DATEADD(MONTH, -6, GETDATE())
    );
*/


DELETE t
FROM dbo.AccountFileTag t
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON t.AccountId = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
WHERE a.ID NOT IN (23382);

DELETE t
FROM dbo.AccountFileTagToFile t
JOIN dbo.AccountFileTag ft ON ft.Id = t.AccountFileTagId
JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON ft.AccountId = atd.AccountId;

DELETE t
FROM dbo.AccountRole t
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON t.accountInfoId = a.ID

DELETE t
FROM dbo.ActivityTestSessionResponses t
INNER JOIN dbo.ActivityTestSessions ats ON t.ActivityTestsessionid = ats.id
INNER JOIN dbo.ActivityTests ah ON ats.ActivityTestid = ah.id
INNER JOIN dbo.CurrentActivity ac ON ah.Currentactivityid = ac.id
INNER JOIN dbo.ChildProfile cp ON ac.childProfileId = cp.id
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON cp.accountInfoId = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
WHERE
    (
        sub.OrganizationTypeId <> 2
    )
    OR
    (
        sub.OrganizationTypeId = 2
        AND a.ID NOT IN (23382)
        AND sub.SubscriptionStatusID <> 1
        AND sub.dateSubscriptionStatusChanged <= DATEADD(MONTH, -6, GETDATE())
    );
